line_items.description: Kafka → MSK migration: engineer-time + data egress + parallel-run period
Build out eu-west active-active failover: net-new compute, IaC work, runbook + chaos drills
Per-tenant rate limit primitive: replace the four duplicated implementations
Run-rate increase from MSK + active-active eu-west (steady-state, post-migration)
Datadog tier-up for retention + APM-on-everything (was sampled)

notes: Net total: $184k capex + ~$12.7k incremental opex/mo. Pre-approved at 2026-04-15 leadership review.
